title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at L&T Infotech

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at L&T Infotech
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
